news-global-econ.title: Revenge of the Meme Stock: GameStop Proposes $56 Billion Acquisition of eBay to Compete with Amazon
news-global-econ.description:
Video game retailer GameStop announced Sunday it has made an unsolicited offer to acquire online marketplace eBay for approximately $56 billion in a cash-and-stock transaction, marking one of the most ambitious takeover attempts in recent corporate history.

news-global-econ.title: Bessent: 'We Have Absolute Control of the Strait'
news-global-econ.description:
Monday on FNC's "America's Newsroom," Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent argued Iranian efforts to shut down the Strait of Hormuz were ineffective and that the United States had control of the strait.

news-global-econ.title: Tenn Gov Lee calls special session to redraw House map in GOP's favor 9-0
news-global-econ.description: Gov. Bill Lee called a special legislative session after speaking with Trump to potentially redraw Tennessee's lone blue district before 2026 midterms.

news-global-econ.title: 6 months to midterms: The Senate seats that could tip the balance of power
news-global-econ.description: The 2026 midterm elections feature ten competitive Senate races that could determine whether Republicans hold or lose their current 53-47 majority.

news-global-econ.title: Nissan Abandons American EV Production Plans, Shifts Focus to Truck Manufacturing
news-global-econ.description:
Nissan has officially canceled its plans to manufacture electric vehicles at its Mississippi assembly plant, opting instead to produce a lineup of body-on-frame trucks and SUVs.

news-global-soc.title: China blocks Meta AI deal over security concerns
news-global-soc.description: China's regulators stopped Meta's reported $2 billion deal to acquire Manus, an AI startup, requiring all parties to withdraw amid a growing U.S.-China tech rivalry.

news-global-soc.title: At Least 10 Injured When 2 Masked Gunmen Open Fire at Oklahoma Lake
news-global-soc.description:
At least 10 people were injured Sunday night in Oklahoma when two masked gunman opened fire "at a park near Arcadia Lake," according to FOX 25.
The post At Least 10 Injured When 2 Masked Gunmen Open Fire at Oklahoma Lake appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: STEVE FORBES: Regulators risk destroying local TV by blocking key media merger
news-global-soc.description: The Nexstar-Tegna transaction could bolster local television journalism by providing the scale needed to compete with Big Tech and streaming giants.

news-global-soc.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent warns Americans about AI-driven bank account hacks as threats rapidly evolve
news-global-soc.description: Treasury Secretary Bessent warns Americans about AI-driven bank account hacks as powerful new AI models expose vulnerabilities in financial systems.
